deployment.evidence: Canonical public slug chirp-launch-board created project bc564b03-f478-4560-b579-72c8e7c117fb with no variable overrides; Railway resolved production, generated a 64-character secret, reached SUCCESS, and passed all 13 stateful checks.

ejection.evidence: Template project 311fbdb7-e10e-4601-8748-dff55ff74172 ejected service 7fa4099a-c058-4394-85c7-dff730766a77 into public independent repository lbliii/chirp-launch-board-ejection-proof; Railway rewired the source and remained SUCCESS.

restart.evidence: Deployment 5908bfb7-ffcb-423d-8efd-ca61928d5b36 restarted successfully; readiness recovered and a signed-session sentinel remained visible with the same browser cookie.

rollback.evidence: Disposable demo project 3e008995-6913-431a-a008-059d9d24e6c9 rolled back from source a524185 to known-good 52fc7a9, passed readiness, then restored a524185 and passed readiness again.

shutdown.evidence: Stopping the disposable demo deployment made /ready unavailable; redeploying the known-good image produced deployment 27a6e0fe-62d2-4ca5-b5dc-4100e08143d6 at SUCCESS and restored readiness.

update.evidence: The template root main advanced from v0.1.3 commit a524185 to v0.1.4 commit 1550c9f; a fresh deployment through the canonical public slug built the exact new commit and passed the complete live journey.
